description: QLAdmin Help PDF domain alignment reference rows for Phase 22B analysis.

rows.business_interpretation: Annual loan interest accrual belongs in policy loan domain, not claim interest.
rows.recommended_governance_action: SEMANTIC_GOVERNANCE_HOLD — exclude from QUIKCLMS emit pending QuikLoan design

rows.current_conversion_route: Not populated; misrouted as claim header only
rows.business_interpretation: Capitalization increases loan balance per Loan Maintenance and Anniversary Processing.
rows.recommended_governance_action: Future QuikLoan conversion spike — not in scope Phase 22

rows.observed_lifepro_pattern: Policy loan rate on Coverage Tab / Plan Information
rows.business_interpretation: Loan rate is policy-loan attribute, not claim MINTRATE.
rows.recommended_governance_action: Hold pseudo-claims; do not populate claim interest rate fields

rows.business_interpretation: Interest in advance vs arrears affects capitalization timing per manual p.130-132.

rows.field_description: Interest paid to date (manual: MLOANIDT; alias MLOANPDT in business spec)
rows.observed_lifepro_pattern: Loan anniversary interest capitalization dates (~Jul 24 annual)
rows.business_interpretation: Report date on pseudo-surrender claim misrepresents loan paid-to semantics.
Loan transaction dates belong in Loan History, not claim report dates.
0412-only cycles adjust accrued/capitalized interest, not principal surrender.
rows.recommended_governance_action: Do not treat as surrender claim

rows.business_interpretation: Billing loan interest is operational billing domain, not claims.

rows.field_description: Claim status: Pending-1; Paid in Full-2; Settled-3; Denied-4; Matured-98; Surrenders-99
rows.potential_target_domain: N/A — should not enter QUIKCLMS for loan-cap-only events
rows.business_interpretation: Status 99 requires cash surrender/death claim processing via Policy Maintenance, not loan capitalization.

rows.field_description: Amount of interest earned (claim benefit interest context)
rows.business_interpretation: Manual defines MINTAMT as claim interest earned; loan capitalization is not claim interest.

rows.field_description: Displays pending/finalized death claims and cash surrenders with settlement semantics
rows.observed_lifepro_pattern: Repeated annual zero-payment surrender rows on active policies
rows.business_interpretation: Active policy with recurring surrendered claims violates Claims Tab business semantics.

rows.qladmin_field: Transaction Type / Accrued Interest / Current Balance
rows.field_description: Loan transactions include loan interest charged; tables affected: QuikLoan
rows.potential_target_domain: Loan History transaction type = loan interest charged
rows.business_interpretation: QLAdmin manual explicitly places loan interest charged in Loan History/QuikLoan.
rows.recommended_governance_action: Future architecture: route 0412/451 to loan domain
